analysis.reasoning: Core message: Russia repatriated 26 children from Syria on a Defense Ministry plane, with doctors accompanying them; all are safe and well. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no mention of the West or hostility. RU2 (alternative system) – not present; no multilateral framing or non-West cooperation emphasis. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – yes; portrays Russia as caring and responsible, conducting humanitarian repatriation and ensuring children's health and safety. RU4 (admirable history) – not relevant. RU5 (world’s forefront) – not claimed; no boasting of capabilities beyond the humanitarian act. RU6 (culture/nature/heritage) – not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3.
